Hero.subtitle: Hiring an Admin takes 30 days. This starts in 7.
Hero.title:
No Admin Yet?
Let a Digital Assistant Hold the Fort.
Hero.description: It chases payments, dispatches jobs, catches leads and does your reports while you search for the right hire — so your new hire walks into a clean, running system.

PainPoints.section_title: Is your company stuck in these daily operational bottlenecks?
PainPoints.section_subtitle: Seemingly small manual processes often accumulate into massive wastes of time and money.
PainPoints.point_1_desc: Customer inquiries scattered across chats with no central tracking, leading to missed orders.
PainPoints.point_2_desc: Manually copy-pasting data to make quotes in Excel/Word takes hours while competitors grab the customer first.
PainPoints.point_3_desc: Constantly rescheduling technicians via phone or text messages, resulting in double bookings or missed appointments.
PainPoints.point_4_desc: End-of-month invoice generation and chasing outstanding payments takes days of tedious follow-up.
PainPoints.point_5_desc: No real-time visibility into technician completion status, making it impossible to answer client queries promptly.
PainPoints.point_6_desc: Scattered spreadsheets make it impossible to get real-time dashboards on sales, schedules, or profitability.

Services.section_subtitle: We provide lightweight, flexible, and high ROI solutions specifically designed for SMEs.
Services.service_1_desc: Review current workflows to identify the most time-consuming, error-prone, and high-impact areas for optimization.
Services.service_2_desc: Connect repetitive tasks using n8n, AI, Email, Google Sheets, Forms, Calendar, CRM, and other tools.
Services.service_3_desc: Build CRM, quoting workflows, ticket tracking, payment reminders, Dashboards, or internal management systems.
Services.service_4_desc: Instead of selling expensive SaaS, we act as your fractional system engineers to continuously optimize and support your tools.

HowItWorks.section_subtitle: We are not just selling software; we are your workflow optimization partner, guiding you from identifying pain points to system rollout.
HowItWorks.step_1_desc: We first understand your current workflows, tools, team division, and biggest bottlenecks.
HowItWorks.step_2_desc: We organize chaotic operational steps into clear processes, identifying areas to simplify, standardize, or automate.
HowItWorks.step_3_desc: We integrate AI, n8n, forms, CRM, Email, Calendar, Dashboards, or your existing tools based on your needs.
HowItWorks.step_4_desc: We help your team actually use it, making processes trackable, handoffs smooth, and enabling continuous improvement.

Industries.section_subtitle: See how we map and automate workflows for different service-based SMEs.
Industries.count_note: This is a complete operations example (4 workflows in total). The Starter plan includes 2 — start with the two steps that hurt most, and add more anytime.
Industries.w_1_s1_d: Customer sends request. Bot parses address & job type directly into CRM.
Industries.w_1_s2_d: Assigns technician based on availability and route optimization.
Industries.w_1_s3_d: Technician uploads before/after photos via WhatsApp link on-site.
Industries.w_1_s4_d: Generates PDF invoice, sends payment link, auto-records PayNow status.
Industries.w_2_s1_d: Client chooses weekly/monthly schedules. Preferences stored in CRM.
Industries.w_2_s2_d: Optimizes assignment to minimize transit distance for staff.
Industries.w_2_s3_d: Staff clicks 'Start' on WhatsApp when arriving to log actual hours.
Industries.w_2_s4_d: Generates monthly invoice summaries & schedules reminders for unpaid balances.
Industries.w_3_s1_d: Client sends repair photos. Admin gets instant Slack/WhatsApp alert.
Industries.w_3_s2_d: Builds quotation using templates, lets client sign digitally.
Industries.w_3_s3_d: Sends technician the exact parts list & location via WhatsApp.
Industries.w_3_s4_d: Sends receipt upon payment. Triggers feedback survey request.
Industries.w_4_s1_d: Form collects required corporate tax docs. Saves to Google Drive.
Industries.w_4_s2_d: Generates standard contract. Digitally signed via SMS/Email link.
Industries.w_4_s3_d: Syncs deadline schedule to Trello/ClickUp. Alerts team of tasks.
Industries.w_4_s4_d: Triggers billing via Stripe/GIRO. Auto-reminds for unpaid fees.
Industries.w_5_s1_d: Shipping requests from email, WhatsApp and platforms auto-merge into one dispatch sheet.
Industries.w_5_s2_d: Every morning at 7 AM, each driver receives their route and delivery orders via WhatsApp.
Industries.w_5_s3_d: Customers get notified automatically on delivery or delay — no more "where's my cargo?" calls.
Industries.w_5_s4_d: Driver uploads proof of delivery; the system generates the invoice and tracks payment.
Industries.w_6_s1_d: Orders close at 4 PM; all channels are totalled by item into tomorrow's production list.
Industries.w_6_s2_d: The production list is sent to the kitchen's WhatsApp group — prep quantities at a glance.
Industries.w_6_s3_d: Delivery sequence and time slots are auto-arranged by address and sent to drivers.
Industries.w_6_s4_d: Client orders are tallied monthly into statements, sent automatically with overdue reminders.
Industries.w_7_s1_d: Clients message to see available slots; bookings write straight into your calendar.
Industries.w_7_s2_d: Automatic reminders the day before each appointment — dramatically fewer no-shows.
Industries.w_7_s3_d: Each visit deducts a session; clients get a renewal nudge when 2 sessions remain.
Industries.w_7_s4_d: Clients receive a personalised offer on their birthday or after 60 days of no visits.
Industries.w_8_s1_d: Residents report faults via WhatsApp with photos; tickets are created and categorised automatically.
Industries.w_8_s2_d: Tickets are auto-assigned to the right contractor, with overdue escalation alerts.
Industries.w_8_s3_d: Tenancy and maintenance contracts trigger alerts 90 days before expiry, with renewal quote templates.
Industries.w_8_s4_d: Ticket counts, completion rates and costs are compiled monthly into a report for owners or MCST.
Industries.w_9_s1_d: Every morning: outstanding payments, stuck jobs and stock levels — a red/green traffic light you read in 30 seconds.
Industries.w_9_s2_d: Tenancy, maintenance contracts, licences and work passes trigger alerts 90 days before expiry.
Industries.w_9_s3_d: Staff report via form; the system cross-checks the roster, computes OT, and exports payroll-ready totals.
Industries.w_9_s4_d: Quotes, service reports and invoices are auto-named and filed into Google Drive — findable anytime.

Trust.section_subtitle: We are built differently to ensure you get immediate value without the usual IT headaches.
Trust.point_1_desc: We connect your existing tools (WhatsApp, Excel, Google Sheets, Gmail) instead of forcing you onto a proprietary SaaS.
Trust.point_2_desc: We speak business workflow, not developer talk. We optimize for speed and simplicity.
Trust.point_3_desc: We don't just hand over the code. We act as your fractional system engineers, keeping it running smoothly.

FAQ.q1: What kind of systems do you build?
FAQ.a1: We build custom WhatsApp bots, CRM integrations, smart scheduling, auto-quotes, and automated invoice tracking tailored to your workflow.
FAQ.q2: Do we need to change our software?
FAQ.a2: No, you don't. We integrate with what your team already uses daily (like WhatsApp and Excel), meaning zero training friction for your staff.
FAQ.a3: Our lightweight integrations typically go live in 7 to 14 days, compared to months with traditional corporate IT firms.
FAQ.a4: Since we use lightweight tools and existing infrastructure, our projects cost a fraction of custom ERP builds, offering instant ROI.
FAQ.q5: Who owns the code and the system?
FAQ.a5: You own all your business data — every record in your Google Sheets and reports is yours. The underlying system is hosted and maintained by us in the cloud, just like subscribing to Microsoft 365. You never need to hire IT staff to babysit it.
FAQ.a6: One workflow = a single trigger + up to 3-4 linear actions. For example: form submitted → record created → PDF quote generated → sent via WhatsApp. Multi-branch logic or multi-system integrations count as a second workflow — we define the scope in writing before quoting.
FAQ.q7: How is legacy data migration charged?
FAQ.a7: Setup includes free import of your latest 30 records for go-live testing. Bulk historical data cleaning and import is an optional add-on, priced in tiers by record count; paper documents or PDF scans are quoted separately as a standalone project.

PainMenu.section_title: Until You Find the Right Person, Let a "Digital Assistant" Step In
PainMenu.section_subtitle: It's not here to replace your team — it carries the repetitive chores so your people can do people work. Pick where you're most short-handed; it starts in 7 days.
PainMenu.tagline: Works 24/7 · Never takes MC · Never makes mistakes
PainMenu.fix_label: What it does for you every day
PainMenu.card_a_pain: A stack of unpaid invoices at month-end, clients keep "forgetting" to pay, and you feel awkward chasing them again and again.
PainMenu.card_a_fix: Every morning it checks which invoices are due, sends a polite WhatsApp reminder in your company's name — with a PayNow QR code attached. One scan, and the money comes in.
PainMenu.card_a_wa: Hi, I'd like to know how the Digital Payment Chaser can help me collect payments.
PainMenu.card_b_pain: Every morning is spent WhatsApping addresses to technicians one by one — and when things get busy, jobs get missed or sent to the wrong person.
PainMenu.card_b_fix: You just tick a box in a sheet. It formats tomorrow's time, address and customer notes, sends them to the right technician's phone on time — and reports back when the job is done.
PainMenu.card_b_wa: Hi, I'd like to know how the Digital Job Dispatcher can help me dispatch jobs.
PainMenu.card_c_tag: Catches every customer who walks in
PainMenu.card_c_pain: A customer asks for a quote on WhatsApp or your website. You're busy and can't reply. By the time you're free, they've already gone with someone else.
PainMenu.card_c_fix: Whether the enquiry comes in via WhatsApp, email or your website, it logs the customer instantly, replies "Got it, we'll arrange this right away" within 30 seconds — and flags the big-ticket enquiries for you to handle first.
PainMenu.card_c_wa: Hi, I'd like to know how the Digital Enquiry Receptionist can help me capture leads.

AssistantDemo.section_subtitle: This isn't a concept sketch. Here's what the digital assistant does on WhatsApp for bosses every day.
AssistantDemo.a_m1: Hi Mr. Wang 👋 A friendly reminder: invoice INV-1024 (SGD 850) is due today. Scan the PayNow QR below to pay directly.
AssistantDemo.a_m3: Payment received ✅ The receipt has been emailed to you. Thank you!
AssistantDemo.a_note: You never had to open your mouth — the money came in by itself.
AssistantDemo.b_event: Boss ticked one box in the schedule sheet ✓
AssistantDemo.b_m1: Alan, tomorrow's job: 🕙 10:00 AM · Blk 123 Bishan St 12 · Aircon cleaning x2. Customer note: kids napping at home, please notify 15 min ahead.
AssistantDemo.b_m3: Reported to boss: Job #304 confirmed by Alan, no schedule clash.
AssistantDemo.b_note: You tick one box. It does the rest.
AssistantDemo.c_m1: Hi, how much for aircon cleaning, 2 units?
AssistantDemo.c_m2: Hello! We've received your enquiry and will arrange a quote for you right away 😊
AssistantDemo.c_event: ✅ Logged to customer list · Sales notified: new enquiry
AssistantDemo.c_m3: Here's your quote: Standard Cleaning Package, SGD 150 (PDF attached). Confirm and we'll schedule your slot.
AssistantDemo.c_note: Even a customer who messages at 9 PM never slips through.
AssistantDemo.d_m1: Morning boss ☀️ Today's ops summary: 💰 3 unpaid invoices totalling SGD 2,150 (1 overdue 14 days) | 📋 6 jobs today — Alan 3, Ben 3, no clashes | 📥 2 enquiries awaiting reply (1 big-ticket ⚠️)
AssistantDemo.d_m2: Did the overdue one get a reminder?
AssistantDemo.d_m3: 2nd reminder sent automatically at 8:01 with PayNow QR ✅ Customer has seen it.
AssistantDemo.d_note: Your whole company's status, read in 30 seconds.

Pricing.section_title: Hire Your Digital Assistant in 3 Steps
Pricing.section_subtitle: Pricing laid out like a menu. No hidden fees, no bottomless customisation.
Pricing.step1_p1: 45 min on-site or online — we watch how your team actually works
Pricing.step1_p2: You get a 3-page picture: where money leaks, how to plug it
Pricing.step1_p3: Decide to proceed? The $79 comes straight off the setup fee
Pricing.step2_p1: Takes over your 2 most time-consuming tasks (e.g. payment chasing + dispatch)
Pricing.step2_p2: Starts work within 7 days — not 1-2 months
Pricing.step2_p3: Adjusted twice to fit how your team works, before going live
Pricing.step2_p4: Want it to handle one more task later? +$199
Pricing.step3_title: We Look After It For You
Pricing.step3_p1: If anything breaks, we fix it — you never have to touch it
Pricing.step3_p2: Handles up to 2,000 tasks for you each month
Pricing.step3_p3: 1 adjustment per month (e.g. change reminder days or phone numbers)
Pricing.step3_p4: Each extra task it takes over: +$49 / month
Pricing.fine_print: "One task" = one fixed starting point + up to 3-4 follow-up actions (e.g. order received → record created → quote generated → sent via WhatsApp). Monthly fee starts the month after your assistant goes to work. All prices in SGD.
Pricing.wa_message: Hi, I'd like to book the $79 on-site workflow check.
